item.title: Their tactics
item.dc:creator: GullahGullahIslander

item.title: I try to post this every year
item.description: I try to post this every year, and leave a little spiel. About how we must never forget. And do better every year. This time around, it’s a little hard. I’m already worn thin, like a pad of butter over to much bread. But that feeling will pass, and the fight has not yet been won. Or lost. So I pull myself together, and say to you “we must remember”
item.dc:creator: sevenfingerman

item.title: Colorado yesterday for those who missed it.
item.description: Imgur. Seriously.. Stop deleting the links. Source: https://old.reddit.com/r/PublicFreakout/comments/1is216f/the_media_is_hiding_this_protest_in_denver/ Contact your representatives in Washington (yes, even if your representatives are Republicans. In fact, ESPECIALLY if they are) for any and all that concerns you. Here is a number for the Capitol switchboard, they'll patch you right through: (202)-224-3121 https://5calls.org/ On the Play store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.a5calls.android.a5calls https://generalstrikeus.com/ Litigation Tracker: Legal Challenges to Trump Administration Actions https://www.justsecurity.org/107087/tracker-legal-challenges-trump-administration-actions/ Keep an eye on the Executive Actions & Legislation. Question each one. https://potustracker.us/ How much is he golfing? https://trumpgolftrack.com/ Keep up with everything happening here: https://old.reddit.com/r/politics/ https://old.reddit.com/r/fednews/ Pardons for criminals, by criminals (ongoing): https://www.justice.gov/pardon Pardons for criminals, by criminals (1st term): https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Brought to you by: "The best people" https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook
item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones

item.title: What Happened Today #18
item.description: Trump’s grip tightens: Regulators submit, Pentagon staff face purges, science is gutted, and press freedom takes another hit. Meanwhile, feds and supporters braved the cold in Chicago to fight back. Will you? LINKS 1 - https://www.politico.com/news/2025/02/18/trump-order-power-independent-agencies-00204798 2 - https://www.newsweek.com/trump-says-ukraine-should-have-never-started-war-russia-2033014 3 - https://apnews.com/article/elon-musk-doge-layoffs-government-data-13653c59c1f6fa0c5ae551f821faafb7 4 - https://www.axios.com/2025/02/14/ap-trump-white-house-gulf-of-america 5 - https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-02-19/us-rattles-romania-with-demand-to-let-far-right-candidate-run 6 - https://www.cbsnews.com/news/nsf-national-science-foundation-trump-probationary-federal-worker-layoffs-firings/ 7 - https://apnews.com/article/doge-pentagon-trump-probationary-workers-military-414b369147fdd043af586c76c0b716c9 8 - https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5151223-dc-prosecutor-trump-zeldin-epa-cheung-doj/

item.title: SoilAeration
item.dc:creator: norestforthecrooked

item.title: In case you needed another reason to be grateful you’re not an American…
item.description: As a female that survived a violent SA that left me for dead next to some train tracks and while in recovery (physically and mentally) found out I was pregnant. I do not share this with anyone outside of my family (my son is 29 now and does know as I don’t hide anything from my children but makes sure that he knows that he is loved beyond measure) but I got justice. WTF HAPPENED TO US?! When will this end? I’m so saddened by who we are and what they allow..please know that in spite of all this- I do still keep hope and love alive by “looking for the helpers”
item.dc:creator: itsanoforme

item.description: No kid should go hungry when we have billionaires

item.title: Cosmopolis - The Gorgon and the Mountain Troll Collection
item.description: All the strips with Natricia the gorgon and Jasper the mountain troll, chronological rather than order of release. I have a lot of plans for these characters, including a couple miniseries where they meet each others' families. Webtoon: https://www.webtoons.com/en/canvas/cosmopolis/list?title_no=913270 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pixels_pens/ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/pixels_pens
item.dc:creator: pixelspens

item.title: Trump signs executive order allowing only attorney general or President to interpret meaning of laws
item.description: President Trump on Tuesday signed an executive order declaring that only the attorney general or the president instead of federal regulators or bureaucrats can speak for the US when interpreting the meaning of laws carried out by the executive branch.
